summary: Retest of footer logo sizing fix (h-[68px] replacing invalid h-17). Verified footer logo renders at exactly 68px height across all viewports and both departments. Navbar logo confirmed at 56px (h-14). Department toggle correctly swaps logo image sources in both navbar and footer. Side menu (h-24) verification skipped due to MENU button not opening within timeout; not a blocker for the reported bug fix.
